positive: A central, stylized depiction of an ancient bioluminescent celestial fox curled among glowing crystal flora. The fox should have flowing, ethereal fur illuminated by internal, deep indigo and sapphire blue light. The background is a nebula-filled, dark cosmic scene, rendered in high contrast linework and vibrant cosmic colors (cyan, magenta, gold). Use a detailed, Alphonse Mucha meets psychedelic mehndi style, featuring clean, defined silhouettes, ornate mandalic patterns surrounding the central subject, and strong symmetrical composition. The overall aesthetic must be suitable for screen printing on dark fabric, emphasizing sharp outlines and luminous glow effects. Intricate details, perfect symmetry, magical realism, digital illustration, high saturation, cosmic glow, bioluminescence.
negative: blurry, noisy, grainy, watermark, signature, text, low resolution, artifact, poorly drawn, bad anatomy, distorted limbs, multiple heads, jpeg artifacts, cartoon, messy, photographic, photo, realistic
